# Chris Kelley — AI Automation & Systems Consulting

> Chris Kelley is a Houston-based AI automation consultant with 10+ years of implementation experience. He helps small and mid-size businesses reduce manual work, connect their tools, and build AI-powered workflows that save 5–15 hours per week.

## What Chris Does

Chris builds practical AI automation systems for small businesses — not theoretical advice, but working systems. Services include workflow audits, custom automation builds, lead engines, and ongoing retainers. First results guaranteed within 7 days.

## Who He Helps

- Service businesses and trades (contractors, pool companies, HVAC, landscaping)
- Real estate agents and brokerages
- Healthcare and medical practices
- E-commerce stores
- Professional services (law firms, accounting, consulting)
- Coaches and content creators

## Services

- **Workflow Audit** — 1–2 hour structured review identifying top automation opportunities ($200–$2,000)
- **Quick Win** — single high-impact automation live in 7 days ($500–$1,500)
- **Systems Buildout** — full workflow audit + 3–5 automations ($1,500–$5,000)
- **Lead Engine** — end-to-end lead capture, follow-up, and nurture system ($2,000–$4,000)
- **AI Employee** — custom AI agent trained on the business ($3,000–$6,000+)
- **Monthly Retainer** — ongoing maintenance and new automations ($500–$2,000/mo)

## Tools & Stack

n8n, Make, Zapier, GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Claude (Anthropic), Vercel, Namecheap, ActiveCampaign, Klaviyo, Dubsado, HoneyBook, Postscript

## Location

Houston, Texas. Works with clients locally and remotely across the US.

- Website: https://chriskelley.io
- Email: chris@chriskelley.io
